code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut maxes: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = parts.len()
  while i < n
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if i == 0 or v > cur
          cur = v
        end
        maxes = list.push(maxes, cur)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  let m = maxes.len()
  while j < m
    match maxes.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if j == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(out)
when None
  println("")
end
